title: Dinko (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dinko''' could refer to several things:

*[[Dinko (corvette group)|''Dinko'']], a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] group
*[[Dinko (Human)|Dinko]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] smuggler
*[[Dinko (creature)|Dinko]], a reptilian species
*[[Dinko (resistance)|Dinko]], a resistance member on [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]
{{Disambig}}
